landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to build amazing apps, powered by a shared Convex backend.
landing.featureSyncDesc: Powered by Convex — data updates instantly across all connected clients.
landing.featureAuthDesc: Built-in email & password authentication with session management.
landing.featureProductionDesc: CI/CD pipelines, type safety, and optimized builds out of the box.
landing.featureResponsiveDesc: Looks great on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
